description: Migrate the Vercel plugin to use SDK utilities: replace manual cookie check with getCookie, replace manual token persistence with getAuthCache/setAuthCache/clearAuthCache, and replace manual waitForAuth with waitUntil.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/vercel && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Migrate Vercel plugin to SDK utilities
userStories.description: Replace Vercel's manual cookie check, token persistence, and waitForAuth with SDK equivalents.
acceptanceCriteria: waitForVercelAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/vercel/src/vercel-api.ts

Context:
1. Cookie check: `document.cookie.includes('isLoggedIn=1')` → `getCookie('isLoggedIn') === '1'`

2. Token persistence — replace with getAuthCache/setAuthCache/clearAuthCache using namespace 'vercel'.

3. waitForVercelAuth — standard polling pattern.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change vercelApi() or any tool files
- Do NOT change extractTeamSlug() or detectAuthentication() logic beyond the cookie check
